name: Off-by-one error in product range
description: Tests whether the reviewer catches an off-by-one error where the docstring says end is exclusive but the code uses range(start, end + 1) making it inclusive.

expected_findings.description: get_product_range documents that end is exclusive but uses range(start, end + 1) which includes the element at index end, returning one extra product. The +1 contradicts the exclusive upper bound contract.

expected_clean.description: Adding validate_page_params helper — correct validation logic with no bugs
